description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling

diff: The Debt Ceiling Breaker affects both the Debt Ceiling and the Maximum Debt Ceiling of a given vault type when activated, disabling the Dynamic Debt Ceiling functionality for that vault type if enabled. To reverse the effect, parameters of affected vault types must be reconfigured with an Executive Vote which is subject to the GSM Pause Delay.
The whitelist may be configured via a successful governance proposal, but must wait for the GSM Pause Delay before changes come into effect. The whitelist is defined in [A.1.
.3.2.3.1 - Debt Ceiling Breaker Exception Whitelist](4937205a-5be0-4def-9b7f-00f9f3bff421) and can be changed via the Weekly Governance Cycle.
